questions.question_text: CO Mapping What are zone plates? Where are they used? 1 What is the use of double refraction? 1 How does the first minima for diffraction from circular aperture differ from rectangular aperture. 2 What are Fresnel half-period zones? 2 State Malus’s law. 3 What conditions are necessary to produce a laser? 3 What is Fermat’s principle? 4 What are the uses of the Quarter and Half wave plate? 4 CO Mapping
What all different ways are there to produce polarized light? How it detected. 1
Derive the expression for resolving power of a grating. 1 CO Mapping
What is Conu’s spiral. Derive its conditions using Fresnel integrals. 2
Derive the expression for diffraction at a straight edge. 2 CO Mapping
Derive the expression for diffraction through a circular aperture. Explain the term 1.22 𝜆 𝑑. 3
Derive the expression for multiple slit diffraction. State the concept of anti-reflection coatings. 3 CO Mapping
Explain how a holographic image is produced with the help of equations. 4
What all constraints are there to produce a Holographic image? Give five uses of Holography. 4
